_doc: Source of truth for Claude Atlas scope registry. Edited by hand. Read by ~/.claude/bin/atlas-sync. See ~/.claude/ARCHITECTURE.md for full context. VPS = headless 24/7 service node (hq.gripp.link), Ubuntu 24. Service node, NOT a dev workstation — so no dev scopes (flagbridge, labor-city, declare-ui, isaac, gravity). Only the notes vault.
